title: Roasted Argentinean Lamb Skewers
description: Funky, bouncy-qq, meal-prep argentinian dish featuring vegetable stock cube, air-fry, no-onion-no-garlic-friendly, served on a hot stone plate.

ingredients.name: red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400°F (200°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together vegetable stock cube, red wine vinegar, olive oil, dried oregano, salt, and pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and coat with the marinade, then thread the lamb onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Thread the cherry tomatoes, red bell pepper, red potatoes, and zucchini onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in the air fryer basket, leaving some space between each skewer for even cooking.
Cook the lamb skewers in the air fryer for 12 minutes, shaking halfway through.
While the lamb skewers are cooking, heat the stone plate in the oven to 400°F (200°C).
Once the lamb skewers are cooked, place them on the hot stone plate and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve immediately, hot from the air fryer.
Let the lamb skewers rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the lamb skewers with your favorite sides, such as rice or roasted vegetables.
Serve the lamb skewers with a side of chimichurri sauce for added flavor.
Garnish the lamb skewers with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Garnish the lamb skewers with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
